mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM sys_department WHERE deleted = 0
AND (department_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
SELECT id, department_code, name, description, creator, enabled, created_at, updated_at, deleted FROM sys_department WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_department (department_code, name, description, creator, enabled, created_at, updated_at, deleted) VALUES (#{departmentCode}, #{name}, #{description}, #{creator}, #{enabled}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt}, #{deleted})
mapper.update:
UPDATE sys_department
department_code = #{departmentCode}, name = #{name}, description = #{description}, creator = #{creator}, enabled = #{enabled}, updated_at = #{updatedAt}, deleted = #{deleted},
WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
